name_en: New🔥 Officially launched new style🔥 2020 opening new Prada《PRADA》 Style No.:66152 Dimensions:30*22*14 Counter-cutting technique, made with imported calf leather 🐮 paired with glossy crocodile texture, soft texture. Fashionable and generous bag shape [Rose] Play with the fashion trend front line [Beer] Original counter hardware [Heart] Soft and comfortable to the touch, perfect details, extra-large capacity, internal divider, comes with official website charm, dust bag, official website card, certificate all included, adhering to high quality
